zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Orrell於大約1352年出生在英國藍卡爾脫爾頓時，他的父親Adam De Orrell II33歲，母親Joan Ince25歲。他於大約1368年與Ellen de Stanley在英國英格蘭藍卡爾奧雷爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1436年3月4日享年85歲。

nameMeanings.name: Orrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from either of two minor places in Lancashire called Orell. The placename derives from Old English ōra ‘bank, slope, hill, edge’ or ōra ‘ore’ + hyll ‘hill’.

variants.name: Orrill
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire and Leicestershire): variant of   Orrell  .

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Orrell was born about 1352, in Turton, Lancashire, England, his father, Adam De Orrell II, was 33 and his mother, Joan Ince, was 25. He married Ellen de Stanley about 1368, in Orrell, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 4 March 1436, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Orrell est né environ 1352, à Turton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Adam De Orrell II, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joan Ince, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Ellen de Stanley environ 1368, à Orrell, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 4 mars 1436, à l’âge de 85 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Orrellが約1352年にイギリスランカシュアイアトゥルトンで生まれた時，父Adam De Orrell IIは33歳，母Joan Inceは25歳であった。約1368年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアオレルでEllen de Stanleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1436年3月4日に85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Orrell(이)가 대략 1352년 영국 랭카실르 터르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam De Orrell II(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Ince(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 오렐에서 Ellen de Stanley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1436년 3월 4일 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Orrell родился около 1352 г. в местности туртон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Adam De Orrell II было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Ince, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen de Stanley около 1368 г. в местности оррелл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 4 марта 1436 г. в возрасте 85 лет.
